title: Russell Hobbs Pearl Glide Steam Iron, Pearl Infused Ceramic Soleplate for smoother glide, 315ml Water Tank, 150g Steam Shot, 40g Continuous steam, Anti-drip & Anti-calc function, 2m Cord, 2600W, 23972
seller_info_text: Dispatched from and sold by H&M-Love&Hope.
features: Pearl infused ceramic soleplate for a 50 percent smoother glide Vs Russell Hobbs Standard Ceramic
Two times more durable soleplate Vs Russell Hobbs Standard Ceramic - designed to be hardwearing and long-lasting
150g steam shot for the toughest wrinkles and 40g continuous steam for tackling creases
Anti-drip feature means water won’t drip onto your clothes as you iron and get your items wet or water-stained
Self-clean feature helps to prevent the build-up of limescale which can help lengthen the lifespan of your appliance
description: From the manufacturer About the brand Modern life is so busy that we rarely stop to appreciate things. Nobody has any time anymore. We’re in a social era, but we don’t meet up. Life just goes on at too quick a speed. As a brand, we’re just trying to remind people to slow down, and appreciate the moment more. Whether it’s a moment to celebrate or not, something big or small, every day or once a year, it’s about going round and getting the kettle on, getting together for a brunch, or even just taking a second to reflect. Russell Hobbs Pearl Glide Steam Iron with Pearl Infused Ceramic Soleplate, 23972 A beautifully designed ceramic soleplate iron, the eye-catching Pearl Glide Iron by Russell Hobbs is a smooth glide iron with durable soleplate continuous steam and large water tank. The Russell Hobbs Pearl Glide Iron brings an element of style to one of the household’s least favourite tasks. Two times more durable - compared to the Russell Hobbs standard ceramic iron Anti-drip and Self-clean features Two metre power cord Product Features Pearl Infused Soleplate The pearl infused soleplate ensures a crisp finish to all of your garments. With 50% smoother glide vs standard ceramic, the Pearl Glide Iron is designed for faster ironing and reduces snagging on delicate garments to ensure smooth results, without having to repeatedly retrace your steps and run the risk of damaging your clothes. Eye-Catching Design Even if you don’t love ironing, it doesn’t mean your household appliances can’t be aesthetically pleasing. The Russell Hobbs Pearl Glide Iron’s attractive and modern design will help brighten your mood and make those chores seem less down-heartening. Steam Shot The 150g steam shot means the Russell Hobbs Pearl Glide Iron has enough steam power to tackle any job, regardless of the fabric. Variable & Vertical Steam Gauge With variable and vertical steam, the Pearl Glide Iron puts you in complete control of how you iron intricate materials or garments. Rely on the large 315ml water tank to take you from start to finish of your ironing duties without having to fill up half way through. Full Specification Add a touch of glamour to your chores and use this well-designed ceramic, pearl infused soleplate iron to do your pile of ironing. Pearl Infused Ceramic Soleplate 2600 Watt 150g Steam Shot 315ml Water Tank Anti-Drip Feature Anti-Calcium Feature Self-Clean Feature Variable & Vertical Steam Two Metre Power Cord

specifications_table.Warranty description: ‎2 years plus 1 year when registered online.
